THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE THE DEFAULT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT IKUE MICHELLE SOU IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT IS SET ASIDE AND DEFENDANT SHALL RESPOND TO THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT WITHIN 20 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT IKUE SOU's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to set aside and vacate the default entered against defendant Ikue Michelle Sou is granted. The default is set aside and defendant shall respond to the operative complaint within 20 days of entry of this order.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Michelle Iku Sou

Dept. 505; Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: D. Carter;

Vonnah Brillet, Esq. appeared with Plaintiff John Luo via zoom.
Chad B. Wyatt, Esq. appeared on behalf of the Defendant vis zoom.

Plaintiff was informed of the Motion to Set Aside Judgment filed 4/1/25 and calendared 6/4/25 in dept. 301.

Today's hearing goes off calendar.

Matter not reported.
